textByHash.06e3c9a7c20243fb40f01e0d7ac9592aba98f8ce: Shhh!! Don't let the others see me here! I'm on a top secret mission for the Burth..., no, nothing. Never mind. Oooo, look, the chaos elemental!! Quick, run!!
textByHash.096334096c2e94f573f7b18b1e8cc582a62b1439: Got a taste for parrots now too has he?
textByHash.0bb4ee433905f1be6bfee36458ef78dc61d83277: Shhhh! That's enough history for one day I think!
textByHash.182e58644228c88989e5259d139b82174f94ebbb: But which witch is which! Anyway, I'm late for an appointment with the oracle.
textByHash.206d10b48779bb5f53e06b65680db1bebfce57c0: Sigh. 2 Parrots sit on a perch. One says to the other 'Can you smell fish'? Hee heheee he ho ho.
textByHash.25c789fe4bdfd6758fc97cbc6e6ed9dc9f0a9013: Just doing a quick survey on famous people and their favourite colour. It's a special feature for 'West Wyverns Women's Weekly'.
textByHash.2fc294c6939276709cbe57df0e4da6c818147e45: Hey, bro! How's the party business?
textByHash.3fe5d75d62983e04e3d4f4096dede8fa758d7860: Arrrr. Avast shipmate. Arrr. I Likes the cut of your gibb. Arrr. That it be.
textByHash.45b68aa931a7b7c5e0e8e9053e862b3ec6a434ed: I swear you get stranger every time.
textByHash.4be372be07e7e36f869faf09b212cc845b62979f: So would you be if you could speak over 1000 languages. I bet it's bliss being ignorant of this world's trouble! I'm off!
textByHash.50b3cc042e632ba606fbd2199b3d5b97991a460b: Who knows. Always cryptic to the last. See you around.
textByHash.52be3d77eaf18a016115d80d5a58a5585d5e0d4c: Well, I'm back. And he said no. Again.
textByHash.56bf0679b0ff2ad964aa37de74ac0446a66cbe3d: You're doing it on purpose now aren't you? Please leave me alone!
textByHash.5875972aca9c6ee27e174891dd5625b3dc21b5ca: Oh dear. Nothing too serious I hope.
textByHash.5ed9041b14df447edebbefdd86b039f7a6217216: Not much, just doing some research on Dwarvern Culture. Did you know that Keldagrim was originally constructed by a long lost clan who embraced the power of magic, and used it to aid with glorious buildings like
textByHash.6729740b32d0fff51782cc95f15932e77927ac7e: Sure, no problems. See you later.
textByHash.6e2d118e9136f4bbfbdd51ebfbe085c2a830fe5d: Not very good I'm afraid. His bosses are pretty cheep.
textByHash.7667c5278d1034cb2f97a27c905f43ace501cde8: First she said 'I am the Oracle, And when I open my lips, let no dog bark!'
textByHash.76ff76ef6dbb17c11061e0416d5540210ea2d331: Well, she started leaping about and pointing to Ardougne, shouting something about betrayal. She was really angry.
textByHash.7ae31c8a94a65cb07b0530ad42708b65837cbd66: Nice. Well, I'm here to talk to some White Knights.
textByHash.83067a2cad37015f62d4961d36f9c3c351fabed0: You're serious aren't you. Listen again. 2 Parrots sit on a perch. One says to the other 'Can you smell fish'.
textByHash.85fa66540f3179f2025ce8611023b7241962b737: Why, am I hic coming apart?
textByHash.8837ea345c41495fcb1e4ad97c36a8c18d4e26d5: Lemons? What are you talking about?
textByHash.8de8b1a19532ad586c62e82eedd0244f81b494c1: Just chatting to my big brother Pete. Hee heee!!
textByHash.8f49e6be09038428e732611cae48ce4cb1dc3181: Hey Pete. Any news from the fleet?
textByHash.a3ad9d376b08ee2593aea88b1f0cc33027127d61: ARGH!! 2 PARROTS. ON A PERCH. SMELLS FISHY.
textByHash.a60ef7e624abb4aff5c9471f3083959a24898316: Sorry, I don't have any messages for you.
textByHash.a6a7e527bf9e4c1c2adf9cced16e8f331987cabb: Well, you know what to do if something goes wrong.
textByHash.aab99267b78f90d3142aa0bd05991ff1a2e78657: Reldo, have you found that book I was looking for yet?
textByHash.b1f6a357e8b3ca9537a6dd4a4d61b650ac64d8b2: Hello . I've got a message for you from Molly. She needs your help urgently. Will you assist her now?
textByHash.b5fcbdc75e505a0fb96e50b671c181eef6dd48bb: Now, how's this thing work again...?
textByHash.bab478ee693d6d1c8296cfc3f558f7ba26870a52: Here! Are you mad? No, 'fraid I can't do that. Could cause all sorts of trouble.
textByHash.bd0af31d17eeaf8aba75b37f89637bdc62923e35: Everyone deserves a hic break you know. It gets pretty tiring lugging burp letters about all day.
textByHash.bdb3694274c3631ae645cf41aaa1489ca2b108f1: I didn't know she was familiar with the works of Shakespeare. So I said 'Et tu, brute?'
textByHash.c1219b9c75970ef9ff8831a4b4aa306710f966e5: Great. Now don't forget - nobody does anything until I give the word! OK?
textByHash.c221bb77b78c84611dc14c248c61eba917afeb1b: Shhhh! It's a library you know!
textByHash.c4985f802536470119e9ef31517046c29343f300: Just chatting to my brother Pete. He keeps Parrots.
textByHash.cd93254537fb1235581bd259b8b35e17e6bac778: Mum wants to know if you're coming round for tea.
textByHash.d4f62b4e5750131616fbd5dfa9ba6a6a5f7ad310: I was just trying to get some wise words of wisdom from the Oracle. You know, she's been here a long, long time.
textByHash.d6dbe7cb27c3f026867d4eb716efdc13b0224793: That's it brother, and we'll come a running!
textByHash.df8424b67c389110ed5d5f7787cc604af4f5cb04: Maybe I haves, maybe I haves. It all goes straight to my head you see.
textByHash.e0709524afe80e975ea1f6b03b794fb7bb3d3f4c: 2 Parrots sit on a perch. One says to the other 'Can you smell fish'? Hee heheee he ho ho.
textByHash.e3f57d3f1a013ce843e3211ca8e7c5cc5a289b86: Just a joke that he told me. Care to hear it?
textByHash.e42add473c567d0fff1514b463463ad62e35a2b1: Psssst! How is the plan going?
textByHash.e42bd2721b0913f8d5fb22dec1be289d23d2a9d3: Yes. They even stayed down there for 1000 years or more, in a time they call 'The age of Kings'.
textByHash.f2c780ea250badb16adf5d739c93760f2df3a8dd: That would be great, thanks. Oh cripes! I've left a fire burning! I'll be back in a mo.
textByHash.f833a5bd19281d99ecdab7a7700f56599ff6bc3a: Cheeky!! If you're not careful I'll get you cursed too!
